chapter_goal: Make currents, residues, characteristic classes, localization, and spectral sequences inspectable as computational ledgers.

visual_sequence.inspection_target: mass remains one while the test-value approaches evaluation at the support
visual_sequence.invariant: kernel mass stays normalized and test integral converges
visual_sequence.representation: Gaussian approximations tested against a smooth form

visual_sequence.inspection_target: local contributions add to the global count
visual_sequence.invariant: residue coefficient and intersection sum match recorded totals

visual_sequence.inspection_target: curvature, zeros, and local denominators feed global formulas
visual_sequence.invariant: every global formula node has local contribution inputs
visual_sequence.representation: dependency graph from curvature/fixed data to global characteristic numbers

visual_sequence.inspection_target: entries survive or die under page differentials
visual_sequence.invariant: total rank never increases from E1 to E-infinity
visual_sequence.representation: page heatmap and interactive page explorer
